_comment: Story bible for the Thiccctionary office. Running bits each staff member can reference in social posts. Auto-extended by generate-office-post.js when a post passes the quality gate. New events should be 1-2 sentences, specific, and reusable.

running_bits.summary: Bart maintains the Saturn V is 'not a vehicle' and therefore ineligible for the catalogue. Teddy disagrees, politely, in Latin where possible. The dispute is in its 14th month.
The Editor-in-Chief is, again, in Monaco. She has filed copy from a yacht, a vineyard, and a small claims court there. No copy from the office in six weeks.
No one in the office has met Spider. The phone number on file is in Macau. The last expense report listed 'a foundry, Sheffield' and 'one (1) ferry, unspecified.'
Bart has filed 47 formal objections since January. Subjects of his most recent objection include: weighted blankets, the trombone (any pitch), and 'the entire premise of submission tag #4413.'
Eli sits by the office window. She has been quietly documenting the city's fire hydrant population. The notebook is up to 312 entries.
Teddy was hired 18 months ago and is, by Bart's accounting, still on probation. Teddy is unaware of this.
Margie's late uncle Bertram founded the publication. The founding date is either 1962, 1971, or 'shortly after the war,' depending on which masthead Margie is referencing that week.
Bart is suspected of being the anonymous author of a 1990s newsletter called Girth Quarterly. He will neither confirm nor deny. He keeps a stapled copy in his desk drawer.
Spider files copy from improbable locations: Hambach lignite mine at dawn, the deck of a supertanker outside Singapore, a foundry in Sheffield, a chai stall in Jaipur.
The office coffee machine has been broken since March. Eli has filed three complaints. Bart says 'the previous coffee machine was better' but won't specify which one.
Bart refers to Teddy as 'the Junior Cataloguer' even when Teddy is in the room. Teddy has stopped pointing this out.
Margie owns a vineyard in Sonoma. The wine is called 'Whitmore Reserve.' It has been described as 'present.'
Bart insists Spider is a pseudonym for his brother-in-law Reginald. He has not produced evidence. Reginald has not returned the office's calls.
